title: Solar SeaWeather and Pollution Transmitter Buoy
description: Autonomous floating buoy powered by solar panel with LiFePO₄ battery, measuring sea-surface weather (temperature, humidity, pressure) and pollution (PM2.5, CO₂) with MQTT telemetry via 4G/LoRa.
objective: Continuous 24/7 operation; measure temp/humidity/pressure/PM2.5/CO₂; transmit data every 5 min; waterproof IP67 enclosure.
constraints: Solar + LiFePO₄ autonomous power; saltwater environment; 4G/LoRa uplink; IP67 enclosure; BOM < ₹15 000.
design_element_titles: Solar Panel + LiFePO₄ MPPT Power System
SHT41 Digital Temperature and RH Sensing

element_usage_notes.Solar Panel + LiFePO₄ MPPT Power System: 20 W panel, 20 Ah LiFePO₄, MPPT controller for 24/7 operation.
element_usage_notes.Waterproof IP67 Marine Enclosure Design: Fibreglass hull buoy; all sensors mounted on top deck; electronics in IP67 aluminium box.
